headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades Healthpeak Properties to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $22
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Richard Hill   downgrades Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $20 to $22.
